programmes.show_description: What song sums up your day? Were you Shopping with the Pet Shop Boys, maybe you've just had a bit of a Bad Day, or was it a sneaky day off enjoying nothing more than Coffee and TV?
Anna Massie with the very best of folk and roots music from Scotland and beyond.
The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.
